lakeformation.permissions.resource.Datab.Description: A structure for the database object.

lakeformation.permissions.resource.DataL.Description: A structure for a data location object where permissions are granted or revoked.

lakeformation.permissions.resource.Table.Description: A structure for the table object. A table is a metadata definition that represents your data. You can Grant and Revoke table privileges to a principal.
Currently not supported by AWS CloudFormation.
